_meta.description: Representative queries for training the benchmark router. Each query is categorised by dominant rubric dimension and complexity level. Labels (best_model) are assigned during training by matching rubric profiles against benchmark scores weighted by cost.
_meta.labeling_framework: Bloom's Revised Taxonomy (Anderson & Krathwohl, 2001) × Webb's Depth of Knowledge (Webb, 1997)

trivial.description: Single fact recall, greeting, basic arithmetic
trivial.criteria: Requires only retrieval of memorized information

simple.description: Single concept explanation, definition, simple procedure
simple.criteria: Requires comprehension of a single concept without multi-step reasoning

moderate.criteria: Requires application of knowledge or analysis of relationships

complex.description: System design, multi-domain synthesis, high-stakes advice
complex.criteria: Requires judgment, creation, or synthesis across domains

expert.description: Open research problems, formal proofs, novel algorithms
expert.criteria: Requires novel intellectual contribution beyond existing knowledge
